response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Handled background chatter and direct speech from Ina. Checked for accuracy. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized manual transcription and translation, as the reference JSON was empty. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely aligned with both Ina's spoken English/Japanese and the surrounding Hololive members' background Japanese conversations. All timestamps follow the MM:SS.mmm format.

subtitles.original: えー、Combat Support Bee, Common.
subtitles.english: Uh, Combat Support Bee (Common).

subtitles.original: で、Farm Support Bee, Rare.
subtitles.english: And... Farm Support Bee, Rare.

subtitles.original: And... oh yeah, I was gonna cook the fish.
subtitles.english: And... oh yeah, I was gonna cook the fish.

subtitles.original: カボチャ？うーん。スイカ売るのって、スイカ売れないでしょ？でも。
subtitles.english: Pumpkin? Hmm... Can we sell watermelons? Ah, you can't sell watermelons, right?

subtitles.original: That was what I was...
subtitles.english: That was what I was...

subtitles.original: ...gonna do.
subtitles.english: ...gonna do.

subtitles.original: Cook the fish.
subtitles.english: Cook the fish.

subtitles.original: Oh, from Shulker you can do that?
subtitles.english: Oh, from Shulker you can do that?

subtitles.original: そう、そう。あれ22、23じゃなかったっけ？もう終わった？
subtitles.english: Right, right. Wasn't that 22 or 23? Is it already over?

subtitles.original: まだだよ。まだだよ。できない... そっかそっか。
subtitles.english: Not yet. Not yet. I can't do it... I see, I see.

subtitles.original: これは半分、株買わないと。
subtitles.english: This is half, I have to buy stocks.

subtitles.original: 行きます。今日、最後。
subtitles.english: Here we go. Today's the last one.

subtitles.original: ししらフード。
subtitles.english: Shishira Foods.

subtitles.original: ぷるぷるぷる...
subtitles.english: Purupurupuru...

subtitles.original: Oh, cap.
subtitles.english: Oh, cap.

subtitles.original: Oh wait, I can sell the bee. / おおー！130！
subtitles.english: Oh wait, I can sell the bee. / Ohh! 130!

subtitles.original: おおー！どんどん上がる。
subtitles.english: Ohh! It keeps going up.

subtitles.original: 198... / 泥棒建設、次行きます。
subtitles.english: 198... / Dorobou Construction is next.

subtitles.original: あ、プラス50円です！
subtitles.english: Ah, it's plus 50 yen!

subtitles.original: おおー！
subtitles.english: Ohh!

subtitles.original: 着実に高くなってる。
subtitles.english: It's steadily getting higher.

subtitles.original: I'm becoming so rich.
subtitles.english: I'm becoming so rich.

subtitles.original: 下がれ！下がれ！買いたいから下がれ！
subtitles.english: Go down! Go down! I want to buy, so go down!

subtitles.original: おおー！
subtitles.english: Ohh!

subtitles.original: プラス30%！めっちゃ上がってる！めっちゃ上がってるじゃん、大空！
subtitles.english: Plus 30%! It's going up so much! Oozora is going up so much!

subtitles.original: 200超えた。すごい悩む。いいね。すごいな。
subtitles.english: It went over 200. This is really tough. Nice. Amazing.

subtitles.original: あ、ああーー！ / ああーー！
subtitles.english: Ah, ahhh! / "Ahhh!"

subtitles.original: クリック... ああーー！1回だけ買うのです。
subtitles.english: Click... Ahhh! You only buy it once.

subtitles.original: これ可愛い。
subtitles.english: This is cute.

subtitles.original: オッケー、これでいいでしょう。よし。
subtitles.english: Okay, this should be good. Alright.

subtitles.original: これで買えない。今何円になった？
subtitles.english: I can't buy with this. How much is it now?

subtitles.original: おおー。来た来た来た。はぁ... いや、これネポラボ売りすごい悩むな。
subtitles.english: Ohh. Here it comes, here it comes. *sigh* Man, I'm really debating whether to sell Nepolabo.

subtitles.original: 結構、見極めないとやばくない？
subtitles.english: Isn't it bad if we don't judge it carefully?

subtitles.original: これが上限か。所持数20？
subtitles.english: Is this the limit? Amount held is 20?

subtitles.original: 暴言吐いてるところ売り切れちゃったよ。
subtitles.english: It sold out while I was spitting abuse!

subtitles.original: すいません！すいません！
subtitles.english: Sorry! Sorry!

subtitles.original: ていうか、20... あ、ネポラボ下がってる！
subtitles.english: Wait, 20... Ah, Nepolabo is going down!

subtitles.original: あ、下がってる？買い時買い時。買った。
subtitles.english: Ah, it's down? Time to buy, time to buy. Bought.

subtitles.original: 24円だとな、悩ましい。まあ、20なら。
subtitles.english: 24 yen is tough. Well, if it's 20.

subtitles.original: いや、大空建設の株いつ売るべきだと思う？
subtitles.english: Hey, when do you think I should sell Oozora Construction stocks?

subtitles.original: Farming. Okay, one more hive.
subtitles.english: Farming. Okay, one more hive.

subtitles.original: And then replenish the honey. And then back to farming.
subtitles.english: And then replenish the honey. And then back to farming.
